description: Hooks for the remember-that plugin: detect repeated corrections and prompt end-of-session reflection.

hooks.prompt: Review the conversation for repeated corrections (user corrected Claude on the same thing more than once) or explicit but unhandled 'remember this' requests. If you find any, set decision to block with a systemMessage asking the user if they'd like to persist the learning using the remember-that skill. Be specific about what you detected. If nothing found, approve.
